title: Decorative Concrete Lattices
description: Decorative Concrete Lattices is a Minecraft mod that adds a wide variety of lattices and decorative walls to your game
body:
![decorative concrete](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6753d84113c36ecfd5dd9eba57b71836ffad4571.png)

Decorative Concrete Lattices is a mod that adds a variety of decorative lattices, walls, and concrete doors, ideal for decorating and giving a modern touch to your homes, buildings, and constructions.

![lattices](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/210dfed9c190fe9dd7360185b43cdfce9cf2f484.png)

![concrete](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f4bd54636236248ac65903e5042cc1b831d90db.png)

**CRAFTING**

![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6438120ea348477c73a56b2af13f3cff80fb506.png)
